name: kurs-bot
description: Add npm package support for kurs-bot (frontend/tooling)

scripts.seed: node ./scripts/venv.js run scripts/export_trigger_embeddings.py --from-starter --out scripts/ci_trigger_data.py && node ./scripts/venv.js run scripts/ci_seed_triggers.py
scripts.ping: node ./scripts/venv.js ping && node -e "(async()=>{try{const axios=require('axios');const r=await axios.get('http://127.0.0.1:8000/',{timeout:3000});console.log('[OK] Local 8000',r.status);}catch(e){console.error('[FAIL] Local 8000',e && e.message);process.exit(2);} })()"
scripts.restart: npm run stop && npm run start
